name: Escape Room: Bank Robbery Gone Wrong

reviews.review_description: Suitable for a younger audience as well. No scary or creepy elements. Nice calmed music. I really enjoyed the second bonus room content with the geek setup.

I love this game because it is not scary because I’ve played other escape rooms and I’ve had to return them because they’re too scary but this one is perfect and it’s so much fun I highly recommend you get this ￼￼￼￼

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words! I'm really glad to hear you enjoyed my game. Feedback like yours truly motivates me to keep creating. I’m currently working on a new game and hope to have it ready in a few months!

reviews.review_description: I want to like this app. I was having fun but it's so glitchy, I can't continue. I can't move smoothly or pick things up.

developer_response.body: Hello! I'm sorry to hear you're having a bad experience. You're welcome to reach out to me on Discord at discord.com/invite/PuyuqjZEVy — I'd be happy to assist you there. In the meantime, try restarting your headset and reinstalling the game, as that often resolves most issues. It should run smoothly. I've tested the game extensively, and you're the first to report performance issues, so your feedback is very helpful.

reviews.review_description: Had a great time playing this escape title with its mix of puzzles and challenges. The tasks were well thought out and fun to solve, especially working through the vault level and finding clues throughout the bank. The VR controls worked smoothly and made solving the room's puzzles feel natural and enjoyable.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! I’m really glad you had a great time solving the puzzles and escaping. It means a lot to hear that the experience felt natural and fun! I’m working hard on my next escape room game and hope you’ll enjoy that one just as much. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: Simple graphics but very fun idea
reviews.review_description: Great idea for an escape room!

We do a lot of in person escape rooms so I was not sure what to expect with the VR version. This game was well written, lots of puzzles some red hearings. All around a fun few hours of okay! Totally worth it. Cannot wait for the developer to create their next escape room!!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! I’m thrilled you enjoyed my game, especially as an in-person escape room fan. I’ve been working on my next VR escape room for 7-8 months, and I’m hoping to release it in 2-3 months. If you want updates you can join my discord com/invite/PuyuqjZEVy

reviews.review_description: I like to do this kind of  puzzles
Not really worth the money. Super short and if you beat it you get to do it again… not a lot of puzzle even for 7 bucks. Try The ROOM dark matter or 7th guest. Waaayyyyy better and more puzzle

developer_response.body: Hello Murphy, I am very sorry that you did not enjoy my game. After finishing the main experience there are 2 additional bonus rooms that you can play (in the left panel of the main menu). The second bonus room is also harder and should take you more time to complete. About the duration I have stated in the description how long it should take you to finish so that you have an idea of what you are buying before making the purchase. Sadly with escape room games it is hard to offer something else after they are completed and the player knows the solutions. You have a speedrun mode available where you can try how fast you are and add your score to the leaderboards, but aside from that there is not much replayability in this ganre.

reviews.review_description: The puzzles are interesting but I keep having performance issues. It freezes often and I have to keep restarting the game to fix it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! I will look into it. If you would like to help you could join the discord (https://discord.com/invite/PuyuqjZEVy) and share some information about your device and when exactly the performance issues appear. Otherwise I am happy that you like the puzzles and I am sorry that you are not able to enjoy the game fully because of the performance issues.

reviews.review_title: Nice intro to escape room games
reviews.review_description: If you’re an escape room genius, you’ll breeze right through but a great start for beginners! Started off moving along fast then took a bit longer in the vault. Some puzzles are obvious while others have extra stuff to throw you off. Very simple environment. Looking forward to the unlocked bonus rooms and any future additions.
Best VR game so far

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! I have spent a lot of time working on this game and it means a lot. I am happy that you liked it and I will continue to improve it and add new content.

reviews.review_description:
I managed to get through the entire game with minor bumps but, that's what escape room games are all about. At times the puzzles are simple and you quickly move on to the next ones but I had to stop to understand or find things I needed to progress. 
Graphically, the game doesn't blow you away, but I think it doesn't bother to have fun solving the puzzles prepared by the developer.

In summary, the game is super chill, the puzzles are at the right level! I certainly recommend getting acquainted with the title.
The game was very interesting, the riddles were not very hard, but at the same time it was fun solving them. I also really enjoyed the speed run option

The experience of playing this game was so nice,
I liked the music and the scenery. I find the puzzles
interesting and challenging, but the hints are always there when you
need them! I'm happy to see that the developer is
adding new rooms and I can't wait to play new levels!

reviews.review_title: Fun Puzzles, I enjoyed every minute of i
reviews.review_description:
Video Review: https://youtu.be/EEvC4PwYxzc

Love this escape room game. .It's challenging but not to a frustrating degree. There are 3 rooms available as of the time making this review with more added later on in 2022 (according to the dev). The visuals aren't its strongest part but I don't care that much when it comes to escape room games, it's all about the puzzles, and they are designed well.

The fact that I got excited when I was able to figure things out, made it worthwhile for me and I'm pretty sure for others as well. There is also a speedrun game mode and I liked the dynamics of some of the solution for the puzzles that changed when I reset the room to start again, so you won't just rush knowing the code in advance (cool idea!)

Nice seeing different locomotion options, as solving might take time and I didn't want to stand it all through. You can grab objects from far by pointing and pressing the trigger, when it turned blue (interactable) then tap the grip button to grab it.

Overall, a well made escape room VR game with cool added features and I can't wait for more rooms to be added; hopefully with even higher difficulty - Recommended, Enjoy!

I'd never done an escape room before (VR or irl) but this was so fun! Challenging enough to make you think and explore the environmental, but not frustratingly difficult. Definitely recommend if you're a first timer or experienced. Also really good at getting you used to the VR environment if you're new to VR in general.

The game can be completed very fast about 40mins as other reviewers say. Puzzles are pretty easy. 
Some stuff needs a little more polish and some sound effects are missing for the tools. 
Music gets annoying pretty fast.
The hint for the Laptop puzzle was a little bit hidden between all the pixelated stuff^^

developer_response.body: Hello! I am happy that you enjoyed the game. If you haven’t yet you can try the first bonus room from the left side of the menu. 2 more bonus rooms will be available by the end of the year. About the music you can change it from the ingame menu or turn it off. I will try to polish some of the riddles as well :)

reviews.review_description: Of all the escape room games I’ve played this one bugged the least. For the simple controls it would be nice to have hand tracking. I really hope the developer expands and adds more complicated puzzles either as extra content here or other games. I got through it so fast i feel kinda like it’s not worth it yet but won’t refund it. Devs work hard and need the funds to keep growing and making better content! Thanks!

Very short...like...very very short...
It's ok otherwise, decent mysteries to solve.

developer_response.body: I am happy that you liked the riddles and I am sorry that for you the game was short. I hope you have not used many hints to find the solutions quicker. I am working on expanding it and I will be adding at least 2 more bonus rooms by the end of the year. Sadly it takes time since I am doing everything by myself. I hope that you will enjoy the new content when it is out as well.

reviews.review_title: An accessible escape room title, finally
reviews.review_description:
Video here: https://youtu.be/EdQ8ZSLkhzI

I've tried a few different escape room games, and I've always got frustrated and given up in the past, however BRGW has puzzles and hints that are at just the right level for someone who isn't great at escape room games like me, so I love it for it!

I've been in many real life escape rooms in the past couple of years, and I can say this game felt like a genuine escape room experience that can be played on VR. You can either play the game as single player and take your time with more difficult puzzles.

reviews.review_title: Possibly The Best VR Escape Room
reviews.review_description:
The best escape room game I've played yet in VR, with very realistic and challenging puzzles, where players can use hints if needed, I highly recommend this game for anyone who likes a challenge!

Video: https://youtu.be/1sEnTOmHU9M

I LOVE IT. First of all, it is still under development. There are a few graphic details here and there that deserve polishing, but the overall experience is GREAT. The puzzles all make sense so if you have some experience you can beat it without frustration. I am looking forward for the updates, this game is very nice to play. 100% RECOMMENDABLE

I'm currently stuck in the diner because after beating the arcade game, the slip of paper won't come out. The first one did, but I beat the game several times and consequent slips of paper won't come out. They just turn around and around without being able to grab them.

Update: The Dev's suggestion worked great and I finished the game. It's short, but sweet. Recommended.

developer_response.body: I am sorry to hear that. After finishing the arcade game please wait until the slip of paper comes out completely before grabbing it. Sorry for the inconvenience I will fix it in the next update. If something else happens you can reset a room by clicking the game menu button on the controller and then on "reset room". Thanks for the feedback!

reviews.review_description: I haven’t ever played an escape room and vr and it was a blast. I have a suggestion to automatically give the first clue when you start to get things going

Not my usual type of game. I'm more about shooting things in the face, but I had fun 
even not shooting things in the face. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XUjFV1nUAKg
Nice puzzler for fans of escape room type games. You can check it out in my top 10 best app lab games list: https://youtu.be/8ZG7KHOOan8
This game is graphically and gameplay wise very good, and it is very fun. I also met the guy who made the game and he is very nice would defiantly recommend it to anyone looking to purchase this game
This was a great experience for the price and it left me stumped a few times. I recommend it and see if you can beat the speed game high score?
I usually only play beat saber and stop when I get bored but playing this game gave me another reason to play VR. Besides for some small visual oddities I have no complaints
I recieved a free key and even then this game is so good I would actually buy it my siblings love if and my dad loves it I liked the simple yet engaging challenge it had
Good small game. I enjoyed it and if you can catch it on a discount I definitely recommend it.

The game was fun and intuitive it took advantage of the fact that we are in VR. Some of the puzzles could have been a bit more elaborate, but that didn’t stop me from enjoying what was actually there. With more polishing this game will be a good example of how a VR escape room should be.

I’m looking forward to the next update.
I have nothing else to say other then “It’s worth the money”. The game is challenging (but has clues that could help you if you get stuck). It is also very addictive.

The game is very fun to play and the perfect amount of challenging, its good that you can receive hints if you don't know what to do. 

It would be more immersive if you can pickup/interact with every item like the ATMs at the start.

Overall a really nice game.
It's done very well i found a out of the map glitch but you can't skip rooms so i think it's amazing

developer_response.body:
I am very happy that you liked it! If you are interested you can join the game's discord and explain the glitch so I can fix it in the next updates:
https://discord.com/invite/PuyuqjZEVy

reviews.review_description:
The promised 90 minutes is a bit of an exaggeration.
The puzzles are simple, the environment is nice but nothing exceptional.
Still...I enjoyed it as I rarely do.
I enjoyed every minute I spent there.
A note on the hints: hilarious!
Especially if you read them afterwards, they make you feel a bit dumb.
For an uncompleted game this is amazing i’m looking forward to what the completed game is like

reviews.review_title: If you like escape room this is for you.
reviews.review_description: This is a Great game. If you like the escape room genre this one is for you. At the time of writing this it is a bit short but more levels and content is on the way. I had a lot of fun playing it and I look forward to seeing what Will be added
a fun, straightforward puzzle! the physics were fun to play around and the puzzles were entertaining!
